name: 2027-01-15 Filipino Empowerment TEST Platform Rule Short FB+IG+TH
description:
Every campaign season, the same promise: traffic will be solved. Every post-campaign season, the same reality: the convoy moves faster than ever. The rest of the country waits.

Infrastructure exists when it serves the announcement. It evaporates when the cameras leave.

Ganun kalala.
